title: Shorter Spears
description: A lightweight standalone pack that provides only Shorter Spears.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a92b20a47e705c3ac65e08f6e199b8abbfbf23c3.png)

Shorter Spears is a lightweight standalone resource pack that includes only this feature from my [PvP Essentials pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chrissi-essentials).

---

**Please note:** This mod is Java Edition only and exclusively hosted on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/chrissi-nightvision). If you'd like to get in touch, feel free to join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Qdk3TcDv6N).

## 

<details>
<summary>Information</summary>

This pack is lightweight and compatible with modern Minecraft versions. All textures & modifications are self-made, crafted with love and care. ♥️

![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/ftOeWzJ.gif)

</details>
